bank.reflect_mission: Maintain durable product and architecture memory for LogK: canonical concepts, Golden Spine, content lifecycle, repo conventions, and long-lived design decisions.
bank.retain_mission: Keep stable LogK facts such as product architecture, domain concepts, system boundaries, workflow conventions, and lasting implementation decisions. Ignore temporary debugging details and short-lived execution state unless they establish a durable pattern.
bank.observations_mission: Consolidate durable product and architecture patterns for LogK, especially core concepts, lifecycle rules, architecture boundaries, and recurring workflow expectations.

directives.name: preserve-canonical-logk-concepts
directives.content: Prefer stable domain concepts, canonical architecture terms, and long-lived workflow rules. Avoid cluttering the bank with ephemeral run details.

mental_models.name: LogK architecture and lifecycle
mental_models.source_query: Summarize the durable architecture, Golden Spine, content lifecycle, and recurring development conventions for LogK.
